india_trends.title: Titan to Kalyan Jewellers: Experts recommend these jewellery stocks to buy after import curbs on gold and silver
india_trends.summary: According to Ravi Singh, Chief Research Officer from Master Capital Services, jewellery demand in India tends to behave differently from many other industries. Experts suggest top jewellery stocks to buy.

india_trends.title: Top Gainers & Losers on May 19: Triveni Turbine, Tata Tech, Angel One, OLA, Coforge, Vodafone Idea among top gainers
india_trends.summary: On May 19, the Indian stock market remained range-bound despite positive opening, with the Nifty 50 closing down 0.23%. The broader market outperformed benchmarks, led by Nifty IT's 3.18% gain. Financial stocks struggled, while geopolitical developments around Iran influenced oil prices.

india_trends.title: Stock market today: Sensex falls 114 points, Nifty 50 ends at 23,618; mid, small-caps outperform
india_trends.summary: Stock market today: The Sensex lost 114 points, or 0.15%, to close at 75,200.85, while the Nifty 50 ended at 23,618, down 32 points, or 0.14%.

india_trends.summary: BEL Q4 results 2026: Profit jumps 5% YoY to ₹2,203 crore; recommends a final dividend of ₹0.55 for FY26

india_trends.title: Do you know how rising bond yields impact equity market?
india_trends.summary: The rise in global bond yields, now above 4.6%, is raising concerns for financial markets amid inflation and geopolitical tensions. Higher yields lead to increased borrowing costs, pressure on equities, and capital flight from emerging markets, impacting economic growth and credit demand.

india_trends.title: Downside risks to economy have begun materializing as continued West Asia conflict casts shadow over India's trade outlook: Crisil
india_trends.summary: The escalating conflict in West Asia is emerging as a major risk for India’s economy, threatening trade flows, increasing import costs, and putting pressure on growth. Higher crude oil and transportation expenses are expected to widen India’s current account deficit and push inflation upward as busi

india_trends.title: Gravity-defying Korean stock boom sparks wild Rolex, Bentley luxury shopping spree
india_trends.summary: South Korea's Kospi market surge has fueled a luxury goods boom, with teenagers and young adults leading the spending spree. Pent-up consumer desire, coupled with limited real estate and overseas travel options, is driving this trend. However, concerns remain about potential consumption contraction

india_trends.title: Infosys cuts Q4 bonus payouts after up to 100% variable pay in previous quarter: Report
india_trends.summary: Infosys has reduced performance bonus payouts for Q4 FY26 to an average of 70%, down from 85% in Q3. Payouts varied by employee level, reflecting ongoing uncertainty in the global tech sector amid AI advancements that are impacting traditional IT services.

india_trends.title: Commodity Radar: Aluminium rally gathers pace as Middle East tensions squeeze supplies. Is 45% one-year rally sustainable?
india_trends.summary: Aluminium prices remain elevated amid Middle East tensions and tight global supply, with sentiment supported by structural shortages. Analysts expect continued strength, with technical indicators pointing to a sustained uptrend and MCX Aluminium trading within a bullish range, supported by instituti

india_trends.title: Gear shift: Bajaj Auto steers KTM closer to profitability in March quarter
india_trends.summary: In the first full quarter since Bajaj Auto took control, the Austrian bikemaker clocked a €5.5 million Ebitda profit on the back of a 70% revenue jump and aggressive cost-cutting following its 2024 bankruptcy.

india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea’s survival has certainty, but shareholders’ patience may be tested
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Idea reduced its loss before tax by 13% to ₹5,515 crore in Q4FY26. The Aditya Birla Group will infuse ₹4,730 crore into the company. Despite this, investor concerns remain over Vodafone’s ability to grow amid high competition and significant debt.

india_trends.title: ICRA lowers India's FY27 GDP growth estimate to 6.2%
india_trends.summary: Rating agency ICRA has revised India's FY27 GDP growth forecast down to 6.2% from 6.5% due to elevated crude oil prices stemming from the West Asia crisis. For FY26, growth is estimated at 7.5%. Q4 FY26 GDP growth is expected to slow to 7% amid moderating industrial and services sectors, with mercha

india_trends.title: Multibagger small-cap stock hits 5% upper circuit after Q4 results; rallies 700% in 5 years
india_trends.summary: Tirupati Forge's stock surged 5% to ₹43.2 after mixed Q4FY26 results, with revenue at ₹43.03 crore and PAT declining to ₹1.52 crore. However, YoY growth showed a 52% revenue increase. Investments in a new defense facility and solar unit aim for long-term growth.

india_trends.title: PepsiCo India to invest Rs 5,700 crore by 2030 on capacity expansion
india_trends.summary: PepsiCo plans a significant investment of up to Rs 5,700 crore in India by 2030. This funding will primarily enhance the manufacturing capabilities of its food business. New facilities are planned in Madhya Pradesh, Assam, and Tamil Nadu. The company sees strong growth potential in India due to risi

india_trends.title: UK regulator monitoring Air India compliance after Dreamliner fuel-switch incident
india_trends.summary: Britain's aviation regulator is watching Air India closely. This follows an earlier request for explanations about a Boeing Dreamliner's takeoff from London with a potentially faulty fuel switch. Indian air safety officials are reportedly heading to Seattle. They will observe Boeing's testing of the

india_trends.title: Software jobs as we know them may soon cease to exist, says Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei
india_trends.summary: As AI tools become more and more capable of writing code, Amodei suggested that there is going to be a fundamental shift in how software is built and paid for.

india_trends.title: India soymeal exports to fall to four-year low on rising prices
india_trends.summary: India's soymeal exports are projected to drop by half to a four-year low in the current year, driven by a 47% price surge over the past month. This makes Indian animal feed uncompetitive against South American supplies, prompting Asian buyers to switch. Tight domestic supplies and strong demand are

india_trends.title: Dhanuka Agritech announces Rs 70 crore buyback, sets price at Rs 1,400/share. Check record date
india_trends.summary: Dhanuka Agritech's board approved a Rs 70 crore share buyback at Rs 1,400 per share, acquiring up to 5 lakh shares. This announcement coincided with a 29% profit jump in Q4FY26 to Rs 98 crore. The company also recommended a final dividend of Rs 2 per share for FY25-26.

india_trends.title: Nifty's two-day bounce is a counter-trend move, not a reversal: Rohit Srivastava
india_trends.summary: Despite recent gains, market sentiment remains cautious as a technical expert views the current bounce as a counter-trend move within a broader decline. Key support at 23,350 is crucial, with a break below expected to lead to further downside. The IT sector's rally, driven by currency, is seen as sh
